descriptions.text: Nintendo World Championships '94 was a 1994 Nintendo-promoted video game competition held during the Nintendo Powerfest '94 tour. Most of the town competitions were held in customized trailers outside of department stores.  It was based on scoring points in a special Game Pak.   The three Super Nintendo Entertainment System games (Super Mario Bros.: The Lost Levels, Super Mario Kart, and Ken Griffey, Jr. Presents Major League Baseball) were played within a time limit of six minutes.

Nintendo PowerFest '94 foi uma competição de jogos eletrônicos patrocinada pela Nintendo que ocorreu em 1994. A maioria das competições ocorreu em furgões em frente a lojas. A competição se baseava em fazer pontos em um cartucho especial. Os três jogos para Super Nintendo Entertainment System (Super Mario Bros.: The Lost Levels, Super Mario Kart, e Ken Griffey, Jr. Presents Major League Baseball) tinham que ser jogados em um tempo limite de seis minutos.

「Nintendo World Championships '94」は、1994年に任天堂がプロデュースしたビデオゲーム大会で、任天堂パワーフェスト '94ツアーの一環として開催されました。街頭で行われた大会のほとんどは、デパートの外に設置された特設トレーラーで行われました。競技は、特別なゲームパック（Game Pak）でポイントを競う形式でした。参加者は、スーパーファミコンの3つのゲーム（『スーパーマリオブラザーズ・ザ・ロスト・レベルズ』、『スーパーマリオカート』、そして『ケン・グリフィー・ジュニアが贈るメジャーリーグベースボール』）を、制限時間6分間でプレイしました。
